title: Integrate acquired prefix with RPL root and LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION
close_reason: Implemented prefix extraction from NET_EVENT_IPV6_PREFIX_ADD in wifi_mgmt_event_handler, migrated to lichen_rpl_root + lichen_rpl_root_set_prefix (updates dodag_id for GUA), wired s_root into init/sync/status, added rpl_root.c to CMakeLists, selected NET_MGMT_EVENT_INFO in Kconfig. Matches spec/04-network.md for 6LBR prefix advertisement. Verified changes compile in scope.
